productDisplayName: Kenneth Cole Men White Dial Watch
description: kenneth cole New york is manufactured using the highest quality materials and craftsmanship. The incorporation of both traditional and contemporary design philosophy result in a unique and modern product. Choose this watch to display your sophisticated and discerning taste in accessories. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: Two years Steel round case Black leather strap with a tang clasp White dial with black and white hands Branding at the 12 hour mark Date aperture at the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
